name: whisparr-sync-ui
description: WhisparrSync settings page — the Cove Whisparr Sync extension's connection/setup frontend (Vite library bundle → index.mjs).

scripts.test: node scripts/check-connection-result.mjs && node scripts/check-hasapikey-invariant.mjs && node scripts/check-reconciliation-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-importlog-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-monitor-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-scene-status-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-scene-actions-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-action-failure-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-entities-batch-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-sync-health-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-error-code-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-batch-coalescer-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-resource-entry-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-identity-guard-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-guided-setup-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-file-settings-logic.mjs && node scripts/check-connection-availability-logic.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run check-classes && npm run test && npm run build
